title: Crumble Topped Baguette
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert with a crumbly topping, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Cut the baguette into 1-inch slices and place on a baking sheet.
Mix the floral honey with 1 tablespoon of water and brush the mixture on each baguette slice.
Roll out the flaky pastry and use a pastry cutter or a knife to create strips.
Place a strip of pastry on top of each baguette slice, pressing gently to adhere.
Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the pastry strips.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the crumble is crispy.
